title: CobbleFoods Advancements
description: An add-on for CobbleFoods, adding more advancements for those who like challenges.
body:
A side-side data pack for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), adding new advancements to [CobbleFoods](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblefoods).

## Advancements
- Today It Was You: Kill an enemy by reflecting their hit with Mirror Coat
- Drank 'Em All!: Drink every berry juice
- Gourmet Master: Trade for every local specialty with an Orchardist Villager
- Feeling Like Silver: Obtain a Silver Platter
- Sweet As Gold: Obtain a Golden Delicacy
- Elemental Superpowers: Obtain all the Eeveelution smoothies

<details>
<summary>Hidden Advancements</summary>
Trust No One, Not Even Yourself: Shoot yourself with a fully charged arrow while affected by both Fragility and Mirror Coat
</details>

## Supported Languages
The data pack is currently fully supported in both English and Italian.
For any language that isn't English, downloading the additional resource pack is required, optional otherwise.
